title: alyssum montanum subsp. transsilvanicum
intro: Alyssum montanum subsp. transsilvanicum, also known as mountain alyssum or Transylvanian madwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of alyssum montanum subsp. transsilvanicum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
